name: LinkedIn Lead Generation Automation
description: An AI-driven LinkedIn automation tool that finds and generates leads for users by automating outreach processes targeting relevant professionals and businesses.

inputs.name: target_market_description
inputs.description: Description of the target market or audience for lead generation.

inputs.name: product_description
inputs.description: Description of the product or service being promoted to potential leads.

inputs.name: LinkedIn_credentials
inputs.description: User's LinkedIn login credentials or API token to enable automation and interaction.

inputs.name: search_criteria
inputs.description: Filters and parameters such as job titles, industries, locations, and keywords to narrow down lead search.

outputs.name: lead_list
outputs.description: List of identified leads with relevant LinkedIn profile information.

outputs.name: automated_outreach_status
outputs.description: Report or log of outreach campaign results including connection requests sent, messages delivered, and responses received.

patterns: AI-powered lead discovery via keyword and profile analysis
Automated LinkedIn connection requests and messaging workflows
Filtering and targeting leads based on custom search criteria
Campaign progress tracking and response handling
steps: Define and input the product description and target market parameters.
Authenticate and connect to LinkedIn accounts for automation access.
Use AI to analyze LinkedIn profiles and find leads matching criteria.
Automatically send connection requests and personalized messages to leads.
Track outreach campaign metrics and manage lead follow-up interactions.
use_cases: Sales teams generating targeted B2B leads on LinkedIn.
Marketing professionals automating personalized outreach campaigns.
Recruiters identifying and contacting potential candidates.
Entrepreneurs building networks and opportunities within specific industries.

prompt_templates.name: lead_generation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Find leads related to the following target market: {target_market_description} and product: {product_description}.

prompt_templates.name: outreach_message_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Generate a personalized LinkedIn connection request message for a lead in {industry} introducing our product: {product_description}.
